names.value: {0: 'Green Light', 1: 'Red Light', 2: 'Speed Limit 10', 3: 'Speed Limit 100', 4: 'Speed Limit 110', 5: 'Speed Limit 120', 6: 'Speed Limit 20', 7: 'Speed Limit 30', 8: 'Speed Limit 40', 9: 'Speed Limit 50', 10: 'Speed Limit 60', 11: 'Speed Limit 70', 12: 'Speed Limit 80', 13: 'Speed Limit 90', 14: 'Stop'}
